main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'biofouling biofilm precursors inadequate pretreatment + storm + FeCl3'.

alternatives.justification: 4 alts (SCAL, MECH cartridge, MECH defect, OXID) anclados.

recommended_action.justification: Operacional: reducir FeCl3 + activar UF polishing — sin CIP de membrana.

requested_data.justification: Pide SEM/optical cartridge — discriminator pero no es el trigger bio del MH.

reviewer_notes: Falta CIP de membrana — acción operacional incompleta.
